Yibei Chen

Random Seeds

  • From DICOMs to fMRIPrep in One Conversation
    March 16, 2026 — The DICOM→BIDS→fMRIPrep pipeline has like five tools duct-taped together to help you format and preprocess your dilligently collected fMRI data (freshly minted DICOMs).
  • Hello World: Welcome to My Blog
    March 16, 2026 — First post on my new blog. A space for thoughts on neuroscience, open-source software, and everything in between.
